title: lactuca viminea var. contracta
intro: Lactuca viminea var. contracta, also known as contracted prickly lettuce, is a plant species belonging to the Lactuca genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions. Its health benefits include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as treatment for skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Lactuca viminea var. contracta can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
